@startuml
title AU2048 Demo Mode Button Sequence Diagram

actor User
participant "MainActivity" as MainActivity #LightBlue
control Controller #White
fragment fragment1 {
  participant "MainActivityFragment\n(extends Fragment)" as MainActivityFragment #white
}
database Model #lightblue


User ->> +MainActivity : Starts App 
activate MainActivity 

note right of MainActivity: onCreate() called by Android system on app start-up or activity restart after being killed to reclaim memory for other apps.\nIt initializes UI components like buttons and text views,\nsaves instance state if available, sets up listeners etc.,\nand calls super.onCreate(savedInstanceState). \nThe setContentView(R.layout.activity_main) method inflates XML layout file into view hierarchy displayed in window associated with this Activity object which contains all widgets defined there including those added programmatically later during runtime via findViewById(int id).\nThen we create new instancesof our custom classes suchas GameBoardView extending SurfaceView classfromandroid.graphics packageusedfordrawinggraphicsonto screenusingCanvasobjectobtainedthroughlock Canvas(Rect dirtyRect=null);methodcallonSurfaceHolderinterfaceimplementedbyGame Board Viewinstanceitselfwhichisreturnedwhenyoucallsurface holder=get Holder();insideyouractivity'scodebeforecallingset Content View().Afterthatweneedtoregistercallbackmethodsforhandlingtouch eventssotheycanbe dispatchedtothecorrectviewwhentheyoccuronthescreen.Thisdoneinsidethe constructorofourcustomclasswhereitsuper(contextattrsstyleAttrRes)=null;constructorparametersthatallowustospecifyhowthisviews houldlooklikeintermsofsizecolorpaddingetc..FinallyweaddanOn TouchListenerimplementationtocaptureanytouchesmadewithintheboundsOfOurCustomViewsoweknowwhatactionshouldbetakenbaseduponwhether
